criteria.name: caller_intent
criteria.description: Caller expressed genuine intent to get coverage — asked about price, plans, or next steps, and showed no hard disqualifying objection (e.g. 'just browsing', wrong state, already covered)

criteria.name: qualification
criteria.description: Agent confirmed the caller's eligibility: age, health/tobacco status, desired coverage amount, and budget — enough to select a real plan

criteria.name: product_fit
criteria.description: Agent presented a specific plan (carrier, coverage, monthly premium) that matched the caller's stated needs and budget; caller acknowledged understanding the offer

criteria.name: verbal_commitment
criteria.description: Caller gave a clear verbal yes or agreed to move forward with the application — explicit buy signal was captured by the agent

criteria.name: application_attempt
criteria.description: Agent actively initiated the application: requested payment information (bank account, routing number, or card), SSN, beneficiary details, or began completing the form with the caller

criteria.name: objection_resolution
criteria.description: Any price, coverage, trust, or 'I need to think about it' objections were addressed and resolved before or during the application step — not left hanging
